reason: Names `merman-wasm` as the intended future browser binding crate.
Defines `merman-bindings-core` as the safe binding facade below external transports.
Shared options JSON contract that the WASM and TypeScript layers should reuse.
Records Web/WASM as currently absent and requiring a new package surface.
Reference wasm-bindgen crate shape and JSON-returning browser API.
Reference TypeScript web package, wasm-pack build, and generated pkg handling.
Reference static output verifier for Pages-style deploys.
Reference live editor UI to migrate and harden after the WASM package works.
First-class wasm-bindgen crate that exposes the browser transport surface.
TypeScript package wrapping generated WASM and typed JSON-contract helpers.
Live editor app integrated with the real WASM package.
Uses web-time for browser-compatible Instant/Duration across the WASM render chain.
